note: Vectors derived from FHFA 2026 Conforming Loan Limits (table_version FHFA-CLL-2026, public FHFA.gov Nov 2025 announcement). 1-unit baseline $806,500; high-cost ceiling $1,209,750. golden_hash empty until golden-parity --update.

vectors.name: conforming_baseline_1unit_va
vectors.description: FHFA 2026 baseline: $700,000 1-unit conventional loan below $806,500 baseline. Conforming. loan_program carried for chain gate routing.

output_payload.table_source: FHFA 2026 Conforming Loan Limits (FHFA.gov, Nov 2025 announcement; FullCountyLoanLimitList2026.xlsx)
output_payload.regulatory_basis: 12 USC 1454 (Freddie Mac Charter §305); 12 USC 1717 (Fannie Mae Charter §304(b)); Housing and Economic Recovery Act 2008 §201; FHFA Annual CLL Adjustment
output_payload.note: County-level limit sourced from caller (county_limit_override) when provided. Baseline and ceiling values are 2026 FHFA announcement. Verify high-cost designation against FHFA county dataset for exact limit.
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.

vectors.name: high_cost_ceiling_1unit
